quotes.quote: The initial user input along with command outputs are treated as user messages to the Planner.
quotes.rationale: Command execution outputs are routed back into the controlling Planner, making execution results a control signal rather than a terminal report.

quotes.quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.
quotes.rationale: An execution error detected at run time triggers documentation lookup and candidate revision, demonstrating implemented closed-loop repair on executability.

quotes.quote: The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.
quotes.rationale: Measured experimental outcomes are reused across iterations to steer subsequent guidance, i.e. results feed back into search rather than terminating.

quotes.quote: Access to documentation enables us to provide sufficient information for Coscientist to conduct experiments in the physical world.
quotes.rationale: Establishes that the evaluated evidence originates from physical-world experimentation.

quotes.quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
quotes.rationale: Humans execute physical steps but are reported to make no decisions, fixing the human authority role at execution only for this channel.

quotes.quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.
quotes.rationale: Human graded labelling is used to score outputs, and the source itself states the scale is subjective and may vary between labelers, with no agreement study reported.

quotes.quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.
quotes.rationale: Withheld data, code and prompts mean no external or independent artifact-based validation channel is reported as operating on this system.

policy_type: LLM Planner receiving user input and command outputs as messages
tool-invoking module policy (Docs searcher, code execution) with iterative protocol revision
memory_structure: message history of user input and command outputs supplied to the Planner
reuse of information obtained during iterative experimental optimization

diagnostics.statement: The human labelling scale used to score system output is acknowledged by the source as subjective and potentially inconsistent across labelers, and no agreement or bias study is reported for that channel.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

diagnostics.consequence: Reported quality scores cannot be separated from labeler variance, so the magnitude of claimed performance is not established.

diagnostics.statement: Data, code and prompts are withheld, so no independent party can reproduce or externally validate the reported results.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.

diagnostics.consequence: All validation evidence remains internal and non-independent; no replication or external assessment channel exists.

diagnostics.statement: The physical experimental loop is only partially automated and its evidence is self-assessed, with human operators moving plates while the source asserts no human decision-making occurred.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.
The normalized advantage values increase over time, suggesting that the model can effectively reuse the information obtained to provide more specific guidance on reactivity.

diagnostics.consequence: The boundary between autonomous system action and human contribution in the physical loop is under-specified, weakening attribution of the improvement trend to the system.

diagnostics.statement: No novelty or prior-art assessment of the system's proposed experiments is reported anywhere in the packet; execution-level correction is the only validation of proposals.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.

diagnostics.consequence: Executability repair is reported but says nothing about whether proposed experiments are new relative to prior art.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Because of safety concerns, data, code and prompts will be only fully released after the development of US regulations in the field of artificial intelligence and its scientific applications.
Although our setup is not yet fully automated (plates were moved manually), no human decision-making was involved.

success_check.observable: An evaluation of system outputs performed by a party organizationally separate from the developers, on released or escrowed artifacts
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: At least one reported outcome assessed by an independent evaluator with access to the same protocols and raw measurements
success_check.evidence_needed: Published independent assessment or artifact release enabling third-party re-analysis

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Despite our attempts to better formalize the scale, labelling is inherently subjective and so, may be different between the labelers.

success_check.observable: Inter-labeler agreement statistic on the graded scale over a shared sample
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Reported agreement coefficient with confidence interval, plus a bias check across labelers
success_check.evidence_needed: Multi-labeler study on overlapping items with per-labeler score distributions

exact_quotes.exact_quote: However, an incorrect heater-shaker module method name was used. Upon making this mistake, Coscientist uses the Docs searcher module to consult the OT-2 documentation. Next, Coscientist modifies the protocol to a corrected version, which ran successfully.

success_check.observable: A prior-art retrieval step applied to proposed experiments before execution
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every proposal accompanied by retrieved comparable prior work or an explicit no-match record
success_check.evidence_needed: Logged prior-art corpus queries and matched references per proposal
